subject: [PATCH v5 07/11] mm: handle PMD swap entries in MADV_WILLNEED

2026-07-22.patch_summary: This patch improves handling of PMD (page map directory) swap entries in the MADV_WILLNEED operation. It ensures that when a PMD swap entry is encountered, it is properly split and handled by the PTE path if necessary. The patch also optimizes the prefetching of PMD-sized folios to avoid unnecessary splitting and improves handling of zswap entries. This enhances the overall performance and reliability of the Linux kernel's memory management system.
